name: Adobe Acrobat Reader Recent Files
categoryDescription: Configuration and artifacts from third-party software — archive tools, cleanup utilities, development tools, and legacy applications.
description: Adobe Acrobat Reader recently opened PDF files.
forensic_value: Reveals recently accessed PDF files including paths to PDFs on network shares or removable media. PDFs are a common phishing delivery mechanism — this MRU corroborates which PDF a user opened and from where.
